services.name: App Service
services.description: Hosts the enterprise RAG web application and API

services.name: Azure AI Foundry
services.description: Orchestrates RAG workflow including cache lookup, search, and GPT-5 calls

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.description: GPT-5 model for response generation using augmented context

services.name: Azure Cognitive Search
services.description: Hybrid vector and keyword retrieval over enterprise content

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.description: Semantic cache for previous RAG queries and responses

services.name: Storage Account
services.description: Stores source documents and indexed content backing Azure Cognitive Search

services.name: Microsoft Entra ID
services.description: Provides user authentication and token issuance for the RAG app

services.name: Key Vault
services.description: Secures secrets and credentials for App Service and AI components

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Central telemetry collection for the RAG application

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Stores and queries logs and metrics for observability and troubleshooting

connections.label: Redirect user to Microsoft Entra ID for OAuth2/OpenID Connect sign-in
Retrieve Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Foundry, and Redis credentials securely
Send authenticated RAG orchestration request with user query and context
Check and update semantic cache for similar queries and responses
Execute hybrid vector and keyword search for relevant documents
Access indexed documents and vectorized content from storage
Call GPT-5 chat completion with augmented prompt and retrieved context
Return final RAG answer and reasoning metadata to web application
Emit application telemetry, request traces, and dependency metrics
Ingest logs and metrics into Log Analytics workspace for analysis

workflow.description: User accesses the RAG web application, which initiates sign-in via Microsoft Entra ID.
After authentication, the application retrieves required secrets and connection strings from Key Vault.
The authenticated client sends a RAG request to the application, which forwards it to Azure AI Foundry for orchestration.
Azure AI Foundry first checks Azure Cache for Redis for a semantic cache hit for a similar query.
On cache miss, Azure AI Foundry issues a hybrid vector and keyword search to Azure Cognitive Search to find relevant documents.
Azure Cognitive Search retrieves indexed documents and embeddings from the Storage Account to satisfy the hybrid query.
Azure AI Foundry constructs an augmented prompt using retrieved content and calls Azure OpenAI GPT-5 for response generation.
Azure AI Foundry returns the generated answer and any metadata to App Service, optionally updating the semantic cache.
App Service sends usage, performance, and dependency telemetry to Azure Monitor for centralized observability.
Azure Monitor forwards collected telemetry to Log Analytics, where it is stored and queried for insights and alerting.

metadata.prompt: An enterprise RAG application with Azure AI Foundry for orchestration, Azure AI Search with hybrid vector and keyword retrieval, Azure OpenAI GPT-5 for generation, Azure Cache for Redis for semantic caching, and App Service with Entra ID authentication
